intro: One swap away from the exit
description:
BLOCKBOUND — Swap, Warp, and Conquer!

Are you ready to defy the laws of space? Step into the world of BLOCKBOUND, an engaging pixel-art puzzle platformer where your wits are your only weapon.

In BLOCKBOUND, you don’t just walk through levels—you rewrite them. Master the unique swapping mechanic that allows you to instantly trade places with blocks. Outsmart deadly traps, navigate through complex structures, and find the path to the exit in this stylish retro-inspired challenge. It’s a perfect blend of old-school aesthetics and innovative puzzle design.

Key Features:

Swap & Solve Mechanics: Use your unique ability to swap places with objects to navigate obstacles and solve intricate environmental puzzles.

Vibrant Pixel Art: Immerse yourself in a beautifully crafted 2D world that pays homage to the classic 8-bit era.

Challenging Level Design: Tackle dozens of unique stages that will test both your reflexes and your logic.

Perfect for Nintendo Switch™: Fully optimized for Joy-Con™ controllers, offering a seamless experience in both Handheld and TV modes.

Retro Chiptune Soundtrack: Stay focused and motivated with an atmospheric soundtrack inspired by gaming history.

Master the art of the swap in BLOCKBOUND!
